title: Bound Bundle v2 Schema (OPF bind, issue #286)
description: The v2 bundle wrapper: an OPF v0.2 document plus the deployment concerns the toaster's bind step attaches (model policy, output contract, activation, optional precision profile). Written by scripts/bind_bundle.py. Artifact-only in this slice -- no runtime consumer reads this schema yet.

bundle_schema_version.description: Wrapper format version. Always 2 for this schema.

playbook_id.description: Registry key this bundle binds to. Always one of the OPF document's own agreement_type.id/aliases -- never invented by the bind step.

opf.description: The FULL embedded OPF v0.2 document, unmodified (deep-equal to the input).

lineage.description: OPF spec section 8 lineage -- copied verbatim from opf.identity.

path.description: Repo-relative path to the model-policy JSON file this bundle was bound against.

hash.description: canonicalize.content_hash of the model-policy file's JSON.

legacy_playbook_path.description: The existing detector/topic data file, e.g. playbooks/eiaa-v1.0.0.json.

pen_rules.description: RESERVED in this slice -- semantics and validation land in #293. The CLI passes this through unvalidated when supplied programmatically; no CLI flag exists for it yet.

overrides.description: GC single-item corrections (issue #294): a governed Posture-version edit and/or stricter-only Floor additions. Absent entirely for a bundle with no corrections applied -- byte-identical to a v2 bundle predating this issue. There is deliberately NO key here for removing or weakening a genesis invariant or genesis posture -- additions/edits only, enforced by additionalProperties: false on this object.

posture.description: A governed edit to the Posture block's system_prompt. version is monotonic per playbook (int >= 1; absent overrides implies genesis version 0). parent_section_digest MUST equal this OPF document's own opf.identity.section_digests.posture -- a stale-edit guard enforced by scripts/bind_bundle.py (not re-derivable from this schema alone).

floor_additions.description: Stricter-only Floor invariant additions, unioned with opf.floor.invariants at composition/judging time (genesis first, stable order). Every id must be new -- scripts/bind_bundle.py rejects any id colliding with a genesis opf.floor.invariants id.
